column1: # Template TSV for bigwig_to_qcat.py --sheet mode and compare_qcat.py
# USE CASE 1: bigwig_to_qcat.py --sheet (convert BigWigs to qcat files)
#   bw       - Comma-separated list of BigWig file paths (5-15 files)
#              OR use separate columns: bw1, bw2, bw3, ... instead
# USE CASE 2: compare_qcat.py with pre-existing qcat files
#   sample     - Unique sample label used in plots
#   replicate  - Integer replicate number within the condition
#   qcat       - Path to qcat.bgz file produced by bigwig_to_qcat.py
# USE CASE 3: compare_qcat.py with BigWig files (on-the-fly conversion)
#   bw         - Comma-separated BigWig list OR bw1,bw2,... columns
#   sample     - Sample label (default: generated from condition/replicate)
# USE CASE 4: batch_pygenometracks.py (batch plotting for each sample)
#   tracks_ini  - Path to pyGenomeTracks INI file
#   enabled  - 1/0 or true/false to enable/disable sample (default: 1)
# NOTE: For genomic regions, see regions_template.tsv
